service.description: Workforce inbox: all conversations, newest activity first, each with agentName, the owning user, and a status derived from the conversation's latest run: SUSPENDED -> pending (+ pendingToolName), RUNNING -> running, FAILED/ABORTED/TRUNCATED -> error, else idle.
One thread: agent info, ordered messages (toolCalls JSON parsed), the latest run's status/error, and pending tool-call requests awaiting decision.

parameter.name: messageList
parameter.description: each: messageSeqId, role, content, toolCalls (List|null), toolCallId, agentRunId, createdDate

parameter.name: latestRun
parameter.description: agentRunId, statusId, errorText; null when no runs
